name: countroster
description: An anything-tracker: a Go server (REST API + SQLite) serving an installable PWA.
author: Chinmay Manjunath

scripts.build: npm run build --workspaces --if-present && npm run build:server
scripts.build:server: cd server && CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -trimpath -ldflags '-s -w' -o bin/countroster ./cmd/countroster
scripts.test: npm run test --workspaces --if-present && npm run test:server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present && npm run vet:server
